use_cases: Displaying progress metrics or KPIs in analytics dashboards
Visualizing health measurements like blood pressure or glucose levels
Showing loading or processing status with indeterminate animation
Representing performance scores or skill levels in metrics interfaces
Indicating goal completion or target achievement in monitoring tools
ai_summary: A customizable circular SVG gauge component that displays numeric values as animated arc progress indicators. Supports multiple sizes, threshold-based color gradients, and indeterminate loading states. Perfect for dashboards, analytics tools, and metrics visualization in SaaS and healthcare applications.
